Bash(curl -s -L -A "ChroniclerDnD/1.0 \(hobby D&D app; contact kalvin.a.taylor@gmail.com\)" "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/e/e5/Soundgoats_-_Audience_Booing.wav" -o public/sounds/crit-fail.wav)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5173/api/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"lore":"The Ashen Reach: a sunless realm of drowned cities and ember-cults who worship a dying volcano god named Courr. Bronze and obsidian, not steel. Salt-witches haunt the tide-flats.","kind":"weapon","request":"uncommon, reward for clearing a salt-witch coven"}' -w "\\n---HTTP %{http_code}---\\n" --max-time 90)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5173/api/world -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"genre":"dark fantasy","tone":"grim, mythic","seed":"a sunless realm of drowned cities and ember-cults worshipping a dying volcano god","name":"The Ashen Reach"}' -w "\\n---HTTP %{http_code}---\\n" --max-time 120)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5173/api/encounter -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"setting":"The Ashen Reach: a sunless realm of drowned cities and ember-cults worshipping a dying volcano god. Factions: the Ember Conclave, the Drowned Choir.","party":"- Vael \(Tiefling Warlock 5\)\\n- Bron \(Dwarf Fighter 4\)\\n- Sela \(Human Cleric 4\)","type":"combat","difficulty":"hard","focus":"a Drowned Choir ambush on an ash-raft crossing a cold black sea"}' -w "\\n---HTTP %{http_code}---\\n" --max-time 120)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5173/api/npc -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"setting":"The Ashen Reach: a sunless realm of drowned cities and ember-cults worshipping a dying volcano god. Factions: the Ember Conclave \(cinder-priests\), the Drowned Choir \(sea-cult\).","role":"tavern keeper","focus":"secretly feeds information to the Drowned Choir"}' -w "\\n---HTTP %{http_code}---\\n" --max-time 120)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5173/api/oracle -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"setting":"The Ashen Reach: a sunless realm of drowned cities and ember-cults worshipping a dying volcano god, Vurr-Oth. Factions: the Ember Conclave \(cinder-priests\), the Drowned Choir \(sea-cult\).","question":"give me a name for the ferryman who crosses the black sea, and his price","history":[]}' -w "\\n---HTTP %{http_code}---\\n" --max-time 90)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5173/api/oracle -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"setting":"The Ashen Reach: a sunless realm of drowned cities and ember-cults worshipping a dying volcano god, Vurr-Oth.","question":"what happens if a player refuses to pay him?","history":[{"q":"give me a name for the ferryman and his price","a":"Old Caul, the Brineblind, who steers by listening to Vurr-Oth'\\''s heartbeat. His price: a secret you'\\''ve never spoken aloud, which he swallows and makes you forget."}]}' -w "\\n---HTTP %{http_code}---\\n" --max-time 90)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5173/api/encounter -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"setting":"The Ashen Reach: a sunless realm of ember-cults and a dying volcano god.","party":"- Vael \(Tiefling Warlock 5\)\\n- Bron \(Dwarf Fighter 4\)","type":"combat","difficulty":"hard","focus":"the party confronts her at the Last Cinder tavern","villain":"Saltwick Vembra — Keeper of the Last Cinder tavern. Personality: warm host, ruthlessly observant. Wants her people to survive the dying god by serving the Drowned Choir. Secret: she pours ale into a baptismal font that carries reports to the Choir. Suggested stat block: Spy."}' -w "\\n---HTTP %{http_code}---\\n" --max-time 120)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); e=d.get\('encounter',{}\); print\('TITLE:',e.get\('title'\)\); print\('ENEMIES:',[x.get\('name'\) for x in e.get\('enemies',[]\)]\); print\('SUMMARY:',e.get\('summary'\)\)")
